name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* Type invariant: each process is in one of the three states *)
TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Transition: a process can move from idle to trying,
   from trying to critical if no other is critical,
   and from critical back to idle *)
Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N: j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  \/ UNCHANGED state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Mutual exclusion property: at most one process in critical *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 1..N: i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, vote, decision

TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in Participants -> {"coordinator", "participant"}
    /\ vote \in Participants -> {"yes", "no", "none"}
    /\ decision \in {"commit", "abort", "none"}

Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> IF p = "coordinator" THEN "coordinator" ELSE "participant"]
    /\ vote = [p \in Participants |-> "none"]
    /\ decision = "none"

Prepare ==
    /\ state["coordinator"] = "coordinator"
    /\ decision = "none"

VoteYes ==
    /\ state["coordinator"] = "coordinator"
    /\ \A p \in Participants : p # "coordinator" => vote[p] = "none"
    /\ \E p \in Participants : p # "coordinator" /\ vote[p] = "none"
    /\ vote' = [vote EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

VoteNo ==
    /\ state["coordinator"] = "coordinator"
    /\ \A p \in Participants : p # "coordinator" => vote[p] = "none"
    /\ \E p \in Participants : p # "coordinator" /\ vote[p] = "none"
    /\ vote' = [vote EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

Commit ==
    /\ state["coordinator"] = "coordinator"
    /\ decision = "none"
    /\ \A p \in Participants : p # "coordinator" => vote[p] = "yes"
    /\ decision' = "commit"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, vote>>

Abort ==
    /\ state["coordinator"] = "coordinator"
    /\ decision = "none"
    /\ \A p \in Participants : p # "coordinator" => vote[p] = "no"
    /\ decision' = "abort"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, vote>>

Next ==
    \/ Prepare
    \/ VoteYes
    \/ VoteNo
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, vote, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\
           state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* philosopher i picks up forks i and (i mod N)+1 if both are free *)
Take(i) == forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[(i % N) + 1] = 0 /\
            forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![(i % N) + 1] = 1] /\
            state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"] /\
            UNCHANGED <<>>

(* philosopher i puts down forks i and (i mod N)+1 *)
Put(i) == forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[(i % N) + 1] = 1 /\
           forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![(i % N) + 1] = 0] /\
           state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"] /\
           UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N : (state[i] = "thinking" /\ Take(i)) \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ Put(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES num, flag, i

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have number 0 and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum number currently held by any process *)
maxNum == Max(Seq(num))

(* Process i's turn: it has the smallest nonzero number, or ties broken by id *)
turn(i) == \A j \in 1..N : (num[j] = 0) \/ (num[j] < num[i]) \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i)

(* Process i's critical section entry *)
Enter(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
            /\ flag[i] = TRUE
            /\ num[i] = maxNum + 1
            /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Process i's critical section exit *)
Exit(i) == /\ flag[i] = TRUE
           /\ flag[i] = FALSE
           /\ num[i] = 0
           /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Next-state relation: any process may enter or exit *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (Enter(i) \/ Exit(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
          /\ head \in 0..K
          /\ tail \in 0..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor


(* State constants *)
Follower == 0
Candidate == 1
Leader == 2

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

(* Transition relation *)
Next ==
  \/ (* Follower transitions *)
     /\ state = Follower
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = Follower
  \/ (* Candidate transitions *)
     /\ state = Candidate
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = self
     /\ state' = Candidate
  \/ (* Leader transitions *)
     /\ state = Leader
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = Leader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == /\ readers \in 0..N
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
             /\ readers' = readers + 1
             /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadExit == /\ readers' = readers - 1
            /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers = 0
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
              /\ readers' = readers

WriteExit == /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = readers

Next == \E action \in {ReadEnter, ReadExit, WriteEnter, WriteExit} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan

(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of channels (p,q) *)
ASSUME Proc = 1..N
ASSUME Chan = { <<p,q>> \in Proc \times Proc : p # q }

(* State of each process: "idle" or "recording" *)
VARIABLES procState, procLocal, channelState

(* procState[p] \in {"idle", "recording"} *)
(* procLocal[p] \in 0..N (number of times recorded) *)
(* channelState[c] is a sequence of messages received after recording *)

TypeOK == /\ procState \in [Proc -> {"idle", "recording"}]
          /\ procLocal \in [Proc -> 0..N]
          /\ channelState \in [Chan -> Seq(N)]

Init == /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> "idle"]
        /\ procLocal = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

Send(p, q, m) == /\ procState[p] = "recording"
                 /\ procState[q] = "idle"
                 /\ channelState[<<p,q>>] = Append(channelState[<<p,q>>], m)

Receive(p, q, m) == /\ procState[p] = "recording"
                   /\ procState[q] = "recording"
                   /\ channelState[<<p,q>>] = Append(channelState[<<p,q>>], m)

Marker(p, q) == /\ procState[p] = "recording"
                /\ procState[q] = "idle"
                /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![q] = "recording"]
                /\ procLocal' = [procLocal EXCEPT ![q] = procLocal[q] + 1]
                /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![<<p,q>>] = <<>>]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, procLocal, channelState>>

RecordState(p) == /\ procState[p] = "idle"
                 /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
                 /\ procLocal' = [procLocal EXCEPT ![p] = procLocal[p] + 1]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, procLocal, channelState>>

Next == \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Send(p, q, 1)
        \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Receive(p, q, 1)
        \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Marker(p, q)
        \/ \E p \in Proc : RecordState(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, procLocal, channelState>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, state

(* State of each node: "idle" or "sending" *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "sending"}]

(* Initially, token at node 1, all idle *)
Init == token = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Node i can send if it holds token and is idle *)
Send(i) == token = i /\ state[i] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "sending"]

(* After sending, token moves to next node, sender becomes idle *)
SendDone(i) == state[i] = "sending" /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1 /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N: Send(i) \/ SendDone(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, state>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ UNCHANGED store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(p) == /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
            /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Accepted(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Next == \E p \in 1..M:
          \E a \in 1..N:
            \E b \in 1..N:
              /\ Prepare(p)
              /\ Promise(a, p)
              /\ Accept(p)
              /\ Accepted(a, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES seq, sent, acked, retries, state

TypeOK ==
    /\ seq \in 1..N
    /\ sent \in 1..N
    /\ acked \in 1..N
    /\ retries \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}

Init ==
    /\ seq = 1
    /\ sent = 0
    /\ acked = 0
    /\ retries = 0
    /\ state = "idle"

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ sent < N
    /\ sent' = sent + 1
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seq, acked, retries>>

AckReceived ==
    /\ state = "waiting_ack"
    /\ acked' = acked + 1
    /\ state' = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seq, sent, retries>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ state = "waiting_ack"
    /\ retries < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retries' = retries + 1
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seq, sent, acked>>

GiveUp ==
    /\ state = "waiting_ack"
    /\ retries = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state' = "failed"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seq, sent, acked, retries>>

Done ==
    /\ acked = N
    /\ state' = "done"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seq, sent, retries>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ AckReceived
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ Done

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seq, sent, acked, retries, state>>

====
